  "findings": [
    "Visible cold joint between concrete lifts",
    "Potential lack of consolidation and bond between successive concrete layers"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Notify the structural engineer of record and the third-party inspector",
    "Perform non-destructive testing (such as ultrasonic pulse velocity or coring) to evaluate the depth and integrity of the joint",
    "Prepare a structural remediation plan based on engineering evaluation"
  ],
  "rationale": "A visible cold joint indicates that the lower lift of concrete had partially set before the next lift was placed, preventing proper consolidation and bonding. This compromises the structural integrity, shear strength, and water-tightness of the concrete element, violating ACI 301 and 304 standards for continuous placement and consolidation.",
  "references": [
    "ACI 301 Specifications for Structural Concrete",
    "ACI 304 Guide for Measuring, Mixing, Transporting, and Placing Concrete"
  ]
}
